For implementing specific models programmatically use statsmodels.

skills.name: statsmodels
skills.description: Statistical models library for Python. Use when you need specific model classes (OLS, GLM, mixed models, ARIMA) with detailed diagnostics, residuals, and inference. Best for econometrics, time series, rigorous inference with coefficient tables. For guided statistical test selection with APA reporting use statistical-analysis.

skills.name: polars

skills.name: freeze

skills.name: guard
skills.description: Full safety mode: destructive command warnings + directory-scoped edits. Use for maximum safety when touching   prod or debugging live systems. Use when asked to "guard mode", "full safety", "lock   it down", or "maximum safety". (gstack)

skills.name: unfreeze
